extraction.one_line_summary: YATES Simon attacked 8km out on final climb to win stage while PINOT Thibaut launched decisive GC attack with 6km remaining, cracking ALAPHILIPPE Julian who lost 1:16.
tactical_patterns: Breakaway required 50km to establish, signaling peloton unwillingness to concede stage early despite multiple HC climbs ahead.
VIVIANI Elia rode prolonged tempo for ALAPHILIPPE on climbs despite being pure sprinter, exposing Deceuninck's shallow climbing roster.
PINOT attacked 6km out when ALAPHILIPPE showed weakness, demonstrating value of probing attacks before final 3km conventional wisdom.
MOVISTAR placed SOLER, AMADOR with LANDA in break then dropped back to pace him, rare successful execution of plant-ahead breakaway tactic.
THOMAS Geraint counterattacked when ALAPHILIPPE cracked rather than pacing group, prioritizing time gains over collaborative chase.

rider_signals.ALAPHILIPPE Julian: negative: cracked with 5km remaining after holding until stage 15, suggesting yellow jersey defense burned matches earlier than expected
rider_signals.PINOT Thibaut: positive: attacked with 6km out and sustained effort to finish line, took sprint bonus despite stage win available showing GC prioritization
rider_signals.BUCHMANN Emanuel: positive: matched BERNAL on Pinot's attack and stayed with podium group, consistently underrated despite top-5 GC position
rider_signals.BERNAL Egan: negative: unable to hold PINOT's wheel despite being Ineos protected rider, raising questions about protected status versus THOMAS
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: positive: counterattacked when ALAPHILIPPE cracked instead of collaborative pace, opportunistic racing despite domestique ambiguity
rider_signals.LANDA Mikel: positive: Movistar executed rare successful breakaway plant with three teammates pacing him through groups on Hourquette
rider_signals.MAS Enric: negative: dropped on Port de Lair while VIVIANI still working for ALAPHILIPPE, major blow to Deceuninck's stage racing depth
rider_signals.YATES Simon: positive: attacked 8km out for stage win despite working for brother Adam, team allowing individual ambition when GC unchallenged
